basics.name: Md. Rashed
basics.label: Research Assistant at BioRAIN Lab
basics.summary: A B.Sc. (Engr.) graduate in Information and Communication Engineering from Pabna University of Science and Technology (PUST). Actively engaged in academic, co-curricular, and research activities. Has completed several government-funded research and innovation projects and published research papers in peer-reviewed international journals. Research interests include Biomedical Image Processing, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, and the Internet of Things (IoT). Currently seeking a Research Associate/teaching position at a university.

projects.name: AI-Based Real-Time Fire & Accident Detection System
projects.summary: A real-time surveillance system using YOLOv8 to detect fire incidents, road accidents, and vehicle number plates from CCTV footage. Funded by the University Grants Commission (UGC). Contributed to data preprocessing (histogram equalization and optical flow), model training, system integration, and implementation of a dual-alert notification system using Telegram and Twilio.

projects.name: IoT-Based Smart Waste Management System
projects.summary: An Internet of Things (IoT)-based smart trash can monitoring system that detects current trash receptivity. The goal is to develop a smart garbage cleanup solution to help keep the environment clean.

projects.name: Design and Implementation of the Dual-Axis Solar Tracking System
projects.summary: A dual-axis solar programmable logical controller (PLC) based automatic tracking system and its supervisory and control system designed to maximize energy generation by tracking sunlight intensity on a PV panel.

projects.name: Design of Smart Home Security System using Object Recognition and PIR Sensor
projects.summary: A home security system with human detection capability using a PIR sensor on Arduino and a webcam on Raspberry Pi 3. The system detects movement and captures images for human recognition.

projects.name: ICE Connect App: A Unified Information Portal for PUST ICE Department
projects.summary: An Android app developed for the Department of Information and Communication Engineering (ICE) at PUST. It provides detailed profiles of all ICE students and faculty members, enabling easy access to academic information and fostering communication within the department.
